additional_sections.content:
Brian Burke · 3rd
🍎 Brian The Mac Man | WaterFront Realtor | Chief Enjoyment Officer | Hustle, Sun & Fun 🌴
May 5, 2011, Brian was Brian’s client

Brian's work has always been above expectations and he is a pleasure to work with. I have used Brian for development of 3 of my apps: "Sell Your Computer," "Expen$e Reports." and "iShaka." Additionally, Brian created my SellYourMac.com logo, which you can see by visiting my website at http://www.sellyourmac.com/. I recommend Brian for your app development and graphic design needs.
